steps.title: Find the measurement method described
steps.content: The passage explicitly states how researchers measured surprise: “based on their ear and head movements.” This directly answers the question about how they determined the level of surprise.

steps.title: Match the method to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A — “They watched how each cat moved its ears and head” — directly reflects this measurement method.

The other three either reference strangers, describe physical interaction, or mention general room movement — none of which match the passage's description.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
